compiled_state.author: Claude

comments.author: Joe Oakhart
comments.body: Plan-review PASS (0 blocking, 8 advisory) already run this session but NOT yet claimed/implemented. Key advisories to honor when implementing: (1) add 'permissions: security-events: write' to the CodeQL workflow; (2) also run pip-audit in gerrit-verify.yaml if that is the gate CI, not only test.yml; (3) decide pip-audit failure policy (which severities fail; handle OSV DB network flake / --ignore-vuln for accepted); (4) pick pip-audit (not leave 'or OSV' ambiguous); (5) CodeQL push-to-main trigger is post-merge — acceptable for a Gerrit-gated mirror, document that. Attestation may be stale by resume (code drift) — re-run review-plan if claim is blocked.

compiled_state.description:
## Why

Supply-chain posture is strong at release (Trusted Publishing / OIDC) but lacks
the consumer-facing and preventative pieces popular OSS is expected to carry:
no SAST, no dependency-vulnerability scanning, and the PyPI attestations the
release action already emits are undocumented. The standard tooling must be
adapted to this repo's reality: GitHub `main` is a **read-only, Gerrit-gated
mirror**, so auto-PR mechanisms are dead-ends and a Scorecard badge would
under-score by design.

## What

- **CodeQL SAST** — add `.github/workflows/codeql.yml` (Python) running on push
  to `main` and on a schedule, uploading results to code scanning.
- **Dependency-vuln scanning** — add a `pip-audit` (or OSV) CI job as a pure
  check (no merge/PR needed), wired into `.github/workflows/test.yml` or its own
  workflow.
- **Alerts, not auto-PRs** — enable/document GitHub + Dependabot **security
  alerts only** (no version-bump PR config, since GitHub PRs cannot merge here);
  document in `CONTRIBUTING.md` that dependency bumps land via Gerrit.
- **Attestations** — verify the release publishes PyPI digital attestations
  (`pypa/gh-action-pypi-publish@release/v1` + `id-token: write`, attestations
  on by default) and document how consumers verify them (e.g. in
  `docs/releasing.md`).

## Scope

`.github/workflows/*` (CodeQL + pip-audit), plus doc notes in `docs/releasing.md`
/ `CONTRIBUTING.md`. Explicitly OUT: OpenSSF Scorecard badge/workflow, SBOM, and
Dependabot version-update PRs (all deferred per the epic's OUT list).

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] `.github/workflows/codeql.yml` runs CodeQL for Python and uploads results.
- [ ] A `pip-audit`/OSV dependency-scan job runs in CI as a check.
- [ ] Docs state that only security ALERTS are used (no auto-PRs) and that bumps
  land via Gerrit.
- [ ] `docs/releasing.md` documents the emitted PyPI attestations and how to
  verify them; a released artifact is confirmed to expose attestations.
- [ ] New workflows are green; no Scorecard badge, SBOM, or Dependabot PR config
  is added.
compiled_state.title: Supply-chain CI hardening: CodeQL SAST, pip-audit scan, alerts, attestation docs
